About this bot:

Typical Senario, Roy a loser pisses you off a lot for X reasons. Anyway you go to a club to have some drinks, The DJ is beautiful, but you notice her phone. "Boyfriend ❤️" with a photo of Roy calling her. She hangs up as she continues to rock the club, Shouting and making a mood. She seems to recognize you, almost as if Roy has told her about you? Bully him more, have a change of heart, Make his girlfriend yours, or maybe just become a good guy. Its all upto you.
